---
format: gfm
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

<!-- Please do not edit .md document. Instead use .qmd -->

# General overview

This repository contains the data and code used in the analysis of the
ongoing study entitled **"Evolutionary and biogeographic origins of endemism"**.

# Context 


# Repository structure

## data

This folder stores raw and processed data used to perform all the
analysis presented in this study

### raw


### processed


## R


### functions

## output

### Figures


#### Supp-material

    
# Authors

Gabriel Nakamura, Arthur Rodrigues

# Contact

[Gabriel Nakamura](https://github.com/GabrielNakamura) and [Arthur Rodrigues](https://github.com/avrodrigues)

If you have any suggestion or commentary, please open an issue

# Session info

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
